feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Differences of PM functionality on ECC & S4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings !

I am still working in SAP ECC version . Can anyone please through some light on the differences between ECC & S4 Hana from PM module aspect ?

Thanking you very much .

Best Regards 

Mohammed

entry.title: Maintenance plans advice
entry.content:
Hi,

I have around 40 assets that require an identical maintenance inspection once a week however it is very likely that only 90% of these assets will be made available to execute the maintenance inspection.

My initial idea was to create an identical inspection maintenance item for each equipment and add them to a newly created weekly maintenance plan. My logic here is that they would only need to execute the tasks in maintenance items on equipment that is available and leave the rest. This will then provide visibility on work done on that equipment.

Would this work?

I know I could just create a weekly maintenance plan that includes tasks for each equipment instead of maintenance items however the disadvantage of this is that if 10% of the equipment is unavailable to execute the maintenance inspection, this task will remain outstanding until the work is complete thus negatively effecting maintenance performance KPIs.

Does anyone have a better solution?

entry.title: Inbound and outbound service for Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Greetings!!

We are working on SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud Edition. An integration between POKA and SAP is necessary for us.

We have been using the "Maintenance Notification" Inbound API lately to prove the payload from POKA and create the notification on SAP. The notification has been successfully created in SAP.

1. By returning the notification number to POKA, we must receive an acknowledgement of the notification that was made on SAP. Hope it will be a outbound service (We are not sure).

2. In addition, whenever there is a change in the notification status, it must also be reflected on the POKA.

Would you kindly recommend

Is it possible to utilize the same "Maintenance Notification" API for acknowledgment?and the status changes to be sent back to POKA ?

Could you please suggest us a Outbound API for this purpose. 

Is it possible to utilize the same API for Inbound and outbound services?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Asset Management SAP Process Integration 

Regards,

Yaswanth.

entry.title: Measurement Document to Deleted Equipment
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When we tried to deactivate a measuring point, we were not able to enter a measurement reading against it.  However, if transfer readings was set up from another point, a measurement doc is created. Also, if we set a measuring point to inactive, we cannot change it back to active.  

Are all these Standard?

Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Is it possible to duplicate a maintenance plan?
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

I am a new sap user, i tried searching but couldn't find nothing about.

Is it possible to duplicate a maintenance plan PM02?

It is so boring to create a new PM02 for a similar equipment with same conditions, task list and so on.

Thank you

entry.title: How to restrict reversal of settlement?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

How to restrict reverse settlement of Maintenance Order to Internal Order if settlement of IO to Cost Center is not yet reversed?

entry.title: Maintenance Notification Workflow
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am new to Workflow and need guidance on the below requirement. How exactly am I going to achieve it.

  1. If X Role creates a notification with the breakdown indicator checked the no approval is needed to create a work order. X Role himself will create the work order
  2. If X Role creates a notification without the breakdown indicator checked then approval is needed to create a work order. X Role will not be able to create the work order
  3. If Y Role  creates a notification  with/without the breakdown indicator then approval is needed to create the work order. The Z role  will be able to create the Work order

The above need is for S4Hana

Regards

Deepak D

entry.title: Resource scheduling app- Work center utilization target line
entry.content:
Hi 

In resource scheduling app , work center utilization graph have target line display ,  

Can we modify this target line ? If yes ,will be going effect scheduling

entry.title: the indicator for relevancy to costing is not set to the option for fully relevant to costing.
entry.content:
Hi Team

When we change on WO component overview the MRP relevance from "Never" to "immediatly" , the costing relevancy is not set automaticaly X-100%.

entry.title: Add operation long text to transaction IW41
entry.content:
IW31 (create order) is having an operation field, and we need to describe the operation in that field. After performing the operation, it will reflect in IW41(order confirmation) however it is not showing the operation long text which is added in IW31 due to restrictions. We would like to know is there any possibility to display the long text without any restriction. Currently the restriction is at 40 characters, we wanted it without any restriction.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: table to get data available capacity per periode tcode cm50
entry.content:
how to find data avaliable capacity per periode tcode cm50 from table?

thank u

entry.title: table to get data available capacity per periode tcode cm50
entry.content: how to get data available capacity per periode tcode cm50 by table structure

entry.title: PM Master Data ( Equipment ) Upload in S4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings !

What are the tools available to upload master data in S4 Hana ?  Can anyone please suggest step by step process with screen shot to upload Equipment master data in S4 Hana system .  Also is there any standard tool available to upload transaction data for cut over activity ?

Thanking you .

Best Regards 

Mohammed

entry.title: Service tab is not available in maintenance order
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Private Edition, and while testing best practices (client 050), we were able to create corrective maintenance orders (YBA1). In the Operations tab, we could add a service for external operations, as shown in the image below:

However, when testing with our own data in a different client, the Services tab is not appearing, even though we are using the same order type.

Does anyone know why this might be happening? Could it be due to a missing configuration, or could it be related to roles or authorizations?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: PM Data Migration from ECC to S4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings for the day !

I have a requirement related to data migration from ECC server to a completely new S4 Hana server . Client wants to scrap ECC server & want to go completely new implementation on S4 Hana 2023 version with new server . In light of this , what are the options available to migrate all PM & PS data ( master data , transactional data , historical data ) from ECC server to S4 hana Server ? Please throw some light on these .

Thanks & Kind Regards 

Mohammed

entry.title: Tables for historical changes of PM Task Lists
entry.content:
hi there

can anyone help me to find out when and who removed the operation from task list? there is an MP which has a task list attached; however the task list operation has been removed, therefore the MP which was supposed to be called on July 22nd, 2024 is on hold. 

I added new operation on 08AUG2024 as shown in screenshot#1 and SAP generated new node and counter in table PLPO, can anyone tell me how I can find missing node 1 ?!

screenshot#1

then operation 20 has been deleted (as created in error) which updated deletion indicator in table PLAS in screenshot#2.

any thought, solution?!

#PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) 

@Amin_Omidy 

kind regards,

Mary

entry.title: Fiori app Report Malfunction configuration error IX007 Partner VW not allowed
entry.content:
I have been trying to configure the Report Malfunction Fiori app and have come across this error when the notification is saved.

Partner function VW is not allowed in partner determination profile PM

I have check the PM profile and Partner VW is not assigned to this profile. We have a Z Partner set up for this profile under Plant Maintenance>Master Data in Plant Maintenance>Basic Settings>Partners>Define Partner Determination Procedure and Partner function. 

Can anyone please point me in the right direction in configuration where I can resolve this error because the SAP Help is very light on.

entry.title: Translation of Object Type
entry.content:
Hello, guys! Please, do you know how to check if SAP has option to maintain translation of Technical Object Type. Where can I check it, please?

For example, I have a list of Object Type in English and I'd like the same list in Portuguese, according to the logon language.

entry.title: Possibility to connect multiple maintenance orders to a service order
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP S/4Hana Service I am trying to test a scenario of creating multiple maintenance orders (either copy, follow-up or a sub order) against a service product in a service order wherein I want to see the parent service order linkage to all those multiple maintenance orders created. 

Please help me understand where we could see that reference of parent service order. I have checked in the document flow and also in AFIH table, did not get it.

 

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Calculation tool for maintenance plans
entry.content:
Hello experts,

i have a question: I need a tool that shows us the future costs of our maintenance plans. IP19, for example, goes in the right direction, but unfortunately there is no option to create the costs there

I know transactions IP31 and IP17/IP18 that can show costs, but they only show the resource that is specified in the Task Lists. and I need to see the costs for each Maintenance plan.

 

Thank you
